hero_headline_line1: Bold Nordic and American Traditional pieces
hero_lede: Bold black and color pieces, focused on Nordic and Nothern European inspired historic pieces and American Traditional designs. Each piece is approached with patience, precision, and a genuine interest in the story behind every piece.
about_paragraph1: Jeff is a tattoo apprentice working toward a style built on strong linework, bold colors, Nordic inspired, American traditional inspired. Every session is about doing the fundamentals right before chasing the flashy stuff.
about_paragraph2: Currently taking bookings while drilling the craft under mentorship.
